name: trace-my-code
description: An agent skill: curated, self-refreshing architecture + domain docs (Obsidian-format, drift hook) that let a coding agent understand your domain and reuse what already exists instead of rebuilding it.

interface.shortDescription: Live domain + architecture map for your coding agent
interface.longDescription: Keeps a curated, self-refreshing trace of your codebase — domain language, architecture, flow, and reuse patterns — so a coding agent understands what you mean and reuses what already exists instead of rebuilding it.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap the trace for this repo.
Plan this feature using the trace (reuse-first).
Refresh the architecture docs for what changed.
